$doc: Leo's taste settings — OFFER each at setup, never force. Ask per key (grouped is fine); record answers in the profile. 'attribution' default is DO NOT APPLY unless Leo opts in on that machine. NOTE: nested settings (e.g. permissions.defaultMode) must be written NESTED in settings.json — never as dotted flat keys.

attribution.note: Blanks Claude attribution on commits/PRs. Default: SKIP (leave harness default) unless Leo says yes.

statusLine.note: Only offer if ccstatusline was installed in the tools step; render the absolute path from the actual install location — never copy a path from another machine.
